_comment: Single-Box Directive 3 §B/§E — the ONE legitimate AWS credential on the box. Scoped to PutObject ONLY on the backup prefix; nothing broader. No ListBucket, no DeleteObject (S3-side retention is the bucket lifecycle rule in s3-backup-lifecycle.json, so the box never needs delete). Replace the bucket/prefix to match the real Astreinc backup bucket. Attach to a dedicated IAM user whose access key lives in /etc/aramo/backup.conf (chmod 600).
